name: Nakoruru

skills.name: DANCING SWORD ARTS
skills.description: After hitting an enemy with a skill, the next Basic Attack is enhanced, dealing extra damage.

skills.name: AMUBE YATORO
skills.description: Deals damage to a targeted enemy and marks the target. Her attacks can trigger the mark to deal extra damage.

skills.name: RERA MUTSUBE
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in her path. Recovers Health for each enemy hit.

skills.name: KAMUI MUTSUBE
skills.description: Gains Movement Speed. Using the skill again deals damage to enemies in the target area, slows them, and reduces their attack.

tips: Nakoruru (Assassin): Tier A on international ranked — 50.67% WR.
Build core: Rapacious Bite, Boots of Tranquility, Axe of Torment.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 50.67%, pick 0.76%, ban 0.1%, popularity tier A.
Counters Wukong, Athena, Xiang Yu · Weak into Diaochan, Fang, Garo.

faqs.question: Is Nakoruru good in current season?
faqs.answer: Nakoruru is Tier A Assassin with 50.67% win rate, 0.76% pick rate, and 0.1% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Nakoruru build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Rapacious Bite, Boots of Tranquility, Axe of Torment, Mortal Punisher, Overlord's Might, Spikemail. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Nakoruru?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Nakoruru: Diaochan, Fang, Garo. Nakoruru is strong into Wukong, Athena, Xiang Yu.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Wukong, Athena, Xiang Yu. Countered by: Diaochan, Fang, Garo.
